positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of a mystical bioluminescent forest grove at twilight. The composition must form a central, clean circular mandala pattern suitable for an apparel print. Focus on stylized, glowing flora, winding root systems, and geometric nature elements. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with psychedelic botanical illustration. Lighting: Extreme volumetric contrast, with electric neon glows (teal, magenta, lime green) popping against a deep indigo/midnight blue background. Clean silhouettes, vector quality, intricate detail, high contrast, print-ready.
